running_headers_to_strip: NEEDS IN THE DAYS OF MOSES AND TODAY
files.notes: This file contains a single article by Mary Foster Gibbs about medical needs, comparing Moses' time to modern day. The article includes extensive quotes from the Word of Wisdom and Doctrine and Covenants. It ends with a short poem titled 'RICHES' by Mrs. Parley Nelson. The file appears to be complete with no other articles merged in.

splits.title: Gems from the General Conference

files.notes: This file contains a single article that compiles highlights and quotes from the General Conference. The article includes speeches from various church leaders and concludes with statistical information about church activities. The running headers 'GEMS FROM THE GENERAL CONFERENCE' and 'RELIEF SOCIETY MAGAZINE' appear throughout the text as page artifacts.

splits.title: What Do You Know?
splits.start_boundary: WHAT DO YOU KNOW? How are you preparing for the coming season?
splits.end_boundary: Have you given one thought to the summer recreation? The

files.notes: The file contains one main article 'An Indian Story' which is a narrative told by Elder J.J. Galbreath about a vision experienced by an Indian named White Calf, followed by a short section 'What Do You Know?' with questions about seasonal preparation. The running header 'RELIEF SOCIETY MAGAZINE' appears on page 406 and 408.

files.notes: The file contains two distinct articles: a lengthy 'Official Round Table' section with news and field reports, followed by a short poem 'Prisoners of the Pit'. The poem appears to be cut off at the end with 'ON THE' which likely continues into the next article 'On the Watch Tower'.

splits.title: Summer Lessons in Hygiene
splits.end_boundary: A SUMMER AT THE U. A. C.

files.notes: This file contains one main article 'Summer Lessons in Hygiene' which includes multiple subsections by different doctors (Dr. Samuel H. Allen, Dr. Raphael S. Olsen) covering health topics, baby care, diet needs, and miscellaneous household tips. The file also contains extensive advertisements at the end. The content matches the table of contents entry for 'Summer Lessons in Hygiene' on page 428.
